questionHtml:
What is the change in the oxidation state of oxygen?

2Fe2+ (aq) + H2O2 (aq) + 2H+ (aq) → 2H2O (l) + 2Fe3+ (aq)


A.  +1

B.  0

C.  −1

D.  −2

meta.title: What is the change in the oxidation state of oxygen? 2Fe2+ (aq) + H2O2 (aq) + 2H+ (aq) → 2H2O (l) + 2Fe3+ (aq) A. +1 B. 0 C. −1 D. −2
